html:
Slingshot Mod UI

Exclusive to:
Slingshot Parts are items exclusive to Don't Starve Together that can only be crafted by Walter after unlocking the Basic Customization skill. Players can use the Slingshot Field Kit on a Trusty Slingshot to open the modification menu. There are three types of parts and each grants different benefits to the Trusty Slingshot. After upgrading the Trusty Slingshot, it will be renamed with the player's nickname.

The basic slingshot with no modifications fires at a rate of 1 shot every 0.8s, or 24 frames. A singular "frame" is 1/30th of a second (not to be confused with modification frames).

With no modifications the basic slingshot can hold 120 of any ammo type.

Contents

  • 1 Slingshot Band
    • 1.1 Pig Skin Slingshot Band
    • 1.2 Flailing Slingshot Band
    • 1.3 Possessed Slingshot Band
  • 2 Handles
    • 2.1 Slingshot Grip Tape
    • 2.2 Slingshot Sticky Grip
    • 2.3 Slingshot Jelly Grip
    • 2.4 Slingshot Void Wrap
  • 3 Frames
    • 3.1 Bony Slingshot Frame
    • 3.2 Thulecite Slingshot Frame
    • 3.3 Scrappy Slingshot Frame
    • 3.4 Scrappier Slingshot Frame
  • 4 Trivia
  • 5 Assets

Slingshot Band

The Slingshot Bands are used to increase Slingshot range and ammo speed. Additionally, the Possessed Slingshot Band also has a 30% chance to fire a mimic shot, consuming no real ammo.

Pig Skin Slingshot Band

“It moderately increases how far you can shoot and how fast your ammo travels.”

-

The Pig Skin Slingshot Band increases Slingshot range by 10% and ammo traveling speed by 10%.

Flailing Slingshot Band

“It greatly increases how far you can shoot and how fast your ammo travels. It can be possessed by a heartless monster...”

-

The Flailing Slingshot Band increases Slingshot range and Ammo traveling speed by 20%.

Possessed Slingshot Band

This content is available only after activating the Shadow Rift

“It greatly increases how far you can shoot and how fast your ammo travels. It sometimes saves ammo by launching a mimic version of it.”

-

The Possessed Slingshot Band is obtained by placing a Flailing Slingshot Band into an Ornery Chest, then defeating the Chest.

It increases Slingshot range and Ammo traveling speed by 20%. It also has 30% chance to fire a mimic shot, which can fire another ammo of its type without consuming it.

The Advanced Bands skill is not required to get this Band, but it is required for Walter to mod and use the Band. The Possessed Slingshot Band cannot be deconstructed.

Handles

The Handles are used to increases Slingshot firing rate and some of the Handles can prevent the Slingshot from slipping out of hands.

Slingshot Grip Tape

“It moderately increases your firing rate, which will ramp up if you shoot continuously.”

-

The Slingshot Grip Tape moderately increases the firing rate, which builds up the longer the player keeps shooting. If the player stops or moves, the speed resets and needs to ramp up again. At max ramp up, the fire rate increases to ~0.63s, (which is a 23.5% reduction in shot cooldown, or a 33% DPS increase of the basic slingshot). A smoke effect appears once the maximum speed is reached.

If you start firing normally directly after shooting with either the scrappy or scrappier frame, the slingshot will start firing at its maximum ramp up.

Number of
continuous shots 		Firerate
(Frames) 		Firerate
(Seconds) 		Firerate
Reduction* 		DPS
Increase*
0 (same as no grip) 24 0.8 N/A N/A
1 23 0.77 3.75% 4%
2 22 0.73 8.75% 10%
3 21 0.70 12.5% 14%
4+ 18 0.6 25% 33%

*Firerate reduction and DPS increase are compared to the unmodded slingshot.

Slingshot Sticky Grip

“It moderately increases your firing rate, and prevents your Slingshot from slipping out of your hands.”

-

The Slingshot Sticky Grip moderately increases the firing rate to 0.63s, or 19 frames (which is a 20.8% reduction in shot cooldown, or a 26% DPS increase of the basic slingshot) and prevents the Slingshot from slipping out of hands.

Slingshot Jelly Grip

“It greatly increases your firing rate and prevents your Slingshot from slipping out of your hands.”

-

The Slingshot Jelly Grip greatly increases the firing rate to 0.5s, or 15 frames (which is a 37.5% reduction in shot cooldown, or a 60% DPS increase of the basic slingshot) and prevents the Slingshot from slipping out of hands.

Slingshot Void Wrap

This content is available only after activating the Shadow Rift

“It greatly increases your firing rate, which will ramp up if you shoot continuously.”

-

The Slingshot Void Wrap greatly increases the firing rate, which builds up the longer the player keeps shooting. If the player stops or moves, the speed resets and needs to ramp up again. At max ramp up, the fire rate increases to 0.43, (which is a 45.8% reduction in shot cooldown, or a 85% DPS increase of the basic slingshot). A smoke effect appears once the maximum speed is reached.

When the player wears Void Cowl and uses the Dread Pebbles, the pebbles will deal 10% more Physical Damage and 5 more Planar Damage.

When the player wears Void Cowl and uses Pure Horror Rounds, they will deal 10% more Physical Damage and 5 more Planar Damage. The tick damage from Pure Horror Rounds is unchanged but does 2 more ticks (9 ticks in total).

Slingshot Void Wrap can be prototyped at Shadowcraft Plinth.

If you start firing normally directly after shooting with either the scrappy or scrappier frame, the slingshot will start firing at its max Ramp up.

Number of
continuous shots 		Firerate
(Frames) 		Firerate
(Seconds) 		Firerate
Reduction* 		DPS
Increase*
0 19 0.63 20.8% 26%
1 18 0.60 25.0% 33%
2 17 0.57 29.2% 41%
3 16 0.53 33.3% 50%
4+ 13 0.43 45.8% 85%

*Firerate reduction and DPS increase are compared to the unmodded slingshot.

Frames

The Frames are used to extend the ammo slot and add a secondary attack.

Bony Slingshot Frame

“Adds a backup ammo slot to your Slingshot.”

-

The Bony Slingshot Frame adds an extra slot to the Slingshot, allowing players to store an additional stack of ammo. When the primary slot is empty, the ammo from the secondary slot automatically moves to replace it.

Thulecite Slingshot Frame

“Adds a special ammo slot to your Slingshot that is used for a secondary, alternate Slingshot attack, that extends any magic effects of your ammo to an area of effect.”

-

The Thulecite Slingshot Frame adds a secondary ammo slot for a special Slingshot attack. Players can right-click to choose the direction and fire from this slot to apply the ammo’s special effects in an area:

  • Freeze Rounds freeze all mobs in the area.
  • Slow-Down Rounds slow down all mobs in the area.
  • Cursed Rounds summon Shadow Tentacles for each creature in the area.
  • Pure Horror Rounds apply 10 Planar Damage for 7 ticks to all creatures in the area.
  • Pure Brilliance Rounds apply a Pure Brilliance mark to all creatures in area, but the damage from the ammo only applies to hit target.

The range of a special attack is significantly longer than a normal attack.

Scrappy Slingshot Frame

“Adds a secondary, alternate Slingshot attack, that can be charged by holding down to deal up to 200% damage.”

-

The Scrappy Slingshot Frame adds a special charge attack. Players can hold right-click to charge, dealing up to 200% damage to the hit creature. The AoE damage and damage from effects do not deal additional damage (Outside of Kablooies). This includes effects from: Cursed rounds, Pure horror rounds, and Brightshade husk rounds.

The charging speed of the charge attack will be sped up by the Grip Tape or Void Wrap handles. The range of a charged attack is significantly longer than a normal attack.

If you start firing normally directly after shooting with either the scrappy or scrappier frame, both the Slingshot grip tape and Slingshot void tape will start firing at their max firerate.

Scrappier Slingshot Frame

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

“Expands the ammo slot to unlimited stack size, and adds a secondary, alternate Slingshot attack, that can be charged by holding down to deal up to 200% damage.”

-

The Scrappier Slingshot Frame expands the ammo slot to unlimited stack size and adds a special charge attack. Players can hold right-click to charge, dealing up to 200% damage to target. The AoE damage and damage from effects do not deal additional damage. The charging speed of the charge attack will be sped up by the Grip Tape or Void Wrap handles. The range of a charged attack is significantly longer than a normal attack.

Trivia

  • In the game files, there is an unused Dragonfly Grip.

Assets

  • Trusty Slingshot + Bony Slingshot Frame Dropped
  • Trusty Slingshot + Thulecite Slingshot Frame Dropped
  • Trusty Slingshot + Scrappy Slingshot Frame Dropped
  • Trusty Slingshot + Pig Skin Slingshot Band Dropped
  • Trusty Slingshot + Flailing Slingshot Band Dropped
  • Trusty Slingshot + Possessed Slingshot Band Dropped
  • Trusty Slingshot + Slingshot Void Grip Dropped
  • Trusty Slingshot + Slingshot Grip Tape Dropped
  • Trusty Slingshot + Slingshot Sticky Handle Dropped
  • Scrappy Slingshot Frame Dropped Old
  • Scrappy Slingshot Frame Old

Scrappy Slingshot Frame[edit | edit source]

“Rather innovative for a child.”

“Adds a secondary, alternate Slingshot attack, that can be charged by holding down to deal up to 200% damage.”
-
The Scrappy Slingshot Frame adds a special charge attack. Players can hold right-click to charge, dealing up to 200% damage to the hit creature. The AoE damage and damage from effects do not deal additional damage (Outside of Kablooies). This includes effects from: Cursed rounds, Pure horror rounds, and Brightshade husk rounds.
The charging speed of the charge attack will be sped up by the Grip Tape or Void Wrap handles. The range of a charged attack is significantly longer than a normal attack.
If you start firing normally directly after shooting with either the scrappy or scrappier frame, both the Slingshot grip tape and Slingshot void tape will start firing at their max firerate.

The AoE damage and damage from effects do not deal additional damage. The charging speed of the charge attack will be sped up by the Grip Tape or Void Wrap handles. The range of a charged attack is significantly longer than a normal attack.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bộ phận Súng cao su là những vật phẩm dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together và chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Walter sau khi mở khóa kỹ năng Tùy chỉnh Cơ bản. Người chơi có thể sử dụng Bộ công cụ súng cao su trên Súng cao su đáng tin cậy để mở menu sửa đổi. Có ba loại bộ phận và mỗi bộ phận mang lại những lợi ích khác nhau cho Súng cao su đáng tin cậy. Sau khi nâng cấp Trusty Slingshot sẽ được đổi tên theo biệt danh của người chơi.
title: Slingshot Part
wikitext:
[[File:Slingshot Mod UI.png|200px|thumb|right|Slingshot Mod UI]] {{Exclusivity|DST}} '''Slingshot Parts''' are items exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' that can only be crafted by [[Walter]] after unlocking the [[Basic Customization]] skill. Players can use the [[Slingshot Field Kit]] on a Trusty Slingshot to open the modification menu. There are three types of parts and each grants different benefits to the [[Trusty Slingshot]]. After upgrading the Trusty Slingshot, it will be renamed with the player's nickname. The basic slingshot with no modifications fires at a rate of 1 shot every '''0.8s''', or 24 frames. A singular "frame" is 1/30th of a second (not to be confused with [[#Frames|modification frames]]). With no modifications the basic slingshot can hold '''120''' of any ammo type. ==Slingshot Band== The '''Slingshot Bands''' are used to increase Slingshot range and ammo speed. Additionally, the Possessed Slingshot Band also has a 30% chance to fire a mimic shot, consuming no real ammo. ===Pig Skin Slingshot Band=== {{Object Infobox |name = Pig Skin Slingshot Band |description = Sling farther! |ingredient1 = Pig Skin |multiplier1 = 1 |filter = {{Pic32|Walter Filter}} |image = Pig Skin Slingshot Band Dropped.png |icon = Pig Skin Slingshot Band.png |skill = Basic Customization |skillOwner = Walter |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "slingshot_band_pigskin"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Walter's really giving it his best shot. |willow = That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning. |wolfgang = Be careful, little scout boy! |wendy = Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting. |wx78 = WEAPON AUGMENTATION. NICE BUT STILL PRIMITIVE |wickerbottom = What is that Walter up to now? |woodie = Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter. |maxwell = He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful. |wigfrid = The yöung scöut döth cöme intö his öwn. |webber = Walter has the best toys. |winona = Aww, Walt's quite the lil' tinkerer. |warly = Young Walter is an artist with his slingshot. |wortox = Hotshot! Is he not? |wormwood = Walter loves pew pew |wurt = Pine boy shooty toy. Florp! |walter = Mmm. Smells like bacon! But don't eat it Woby! |wanda = Rather innovative for a child. |choose = walter }} {{Scrapbook Info|It moderately increases how far you can shoot and how fast your ammo travels.}} The '''Pig Skin Slingshot Band''' increases Slingshot range by 10% and ammo traveling speed by 10%. {{clear}} ===Flailing Slingshot Band=== {{Object Infobox |name = Flailing Slingshot Band |description = Sling farther-er! |ingredient1 = Cat Tail |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Tentacle Spots |multiplier2 = 1 |filter = {{Pic32|Walter Filter}} |image = Flailing Slingshot Band Dropped.png |icon = Flailing Slingshot Band.png |skill = Advanced Bands |skillOwner = Walter |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "slingshot_band_tentacle"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Walter's really giving it his best shot. |willow = That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning. |wolfgang = Be careful, little scout boy! |wendy = Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting. |wx78 = WEAPON AUGMENTATION. NICE BUT STILL PRIMITIVE |wickerbottom = What is that Walter up to now? |woodie = Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter. |maxwell = He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful. |wigfrid = The yöung scöut döth cöme intö his öwn. |webber = Walter has the best toys. |winona = Aww, Walt's quite the lil' tinkerer. |warly = Young Walter is an artist with his slingshot. |wortox = Hotshot! Is he not? |wormwood = Walter loves pew pew |wurt = Pine boy shooty toy. Florp! |walter = It's a little twitchy! |wanda = Rather innovative for a child. |choose = walter }} {{Scrapbook Info|It greatly increases how far you can shoot and how fast your ammo travels. It can be possessed by a heartless monster...}} The '''Flailing Slingshot Band''' increases Slingshot range and Ammo traveling speed by 20%. {{clear}} ===Possessed Slingshot Band=== {{Object Infobox |name = Possessed Slingshot Band |image = Possessed Slingshot Band Dropped.png |icon = Possessed Slingshot Band.png |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "slingshot_band_mimic"}} {{Rift Content|Shadow Rift}} {{Quotes |wilson = Walter's really giving it his best shot. |willow = That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning. |wolfgang = Be careful, little scout boy! |wendy = Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting. |wx78 = WEAPON AUGMENTATION. NICE BUT STILL PRIMITIVE |wickerbottom = What is that Walter up to now? |woodie = Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter. |maxwell = He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful. |wigfrid = The yöung scöut döth cöme intö his öwn. |webber = Walter has the best toys. |winona = Aww, Walt's quite the lil' tinkerer. |warly = Young Walter is an artist with his slingshot. |wortox = Hotshot! Is he not? |wormwood = Walter loves pew pew |wurt = Pine boy shooty toy. Florp! |walter = Creepy! I love it. |wanda = Rather innovative for a child. |choose = walter }} {{Scrapbook Info|It greatly increases how far you can shoot and how fast your ammo travels. It sometimes saves ammo by launching a mimic version of it.}} The '''Possessed Slingshot Band''' is obtained by placing a [[#Flailing Slingshot Band|Flailing Slingshot Band]] into an [[Ornery Chest]], then defeating the Chest. It increases Slingshot range and Ammo traveling speed by 20%. It also has 30% chance to fire a mimic shot, which can fire another ammo of its type without consuming it. The [[Advanced Bands]] skill is not required to get this Band, but it is required for Walter to mod and use the Band. The Possessed Slingshot Band cannot be deconstructed. {{clear}} ==Handles== The '''Handles''' are used to increases Slingshot firing rate and some of the Handles can prevent the Slingshot from slipping out of hands. ===Slingshot Grip Tape=== {{Object Infobox |name = Slingshot Grip Tape |description =Sling faster! |ingredient1 = Silk |multiplier1 = 2 |filter = {{Pic32|Walter Filter}} |image = Slingshot Grip Tape Dropped.png |icon = Slingshot Grip Tape.png |skill =Basic Customization |skillOwner = Walter |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "slingshot_handle_silk"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Walter's really giving it his best shot. |willow = That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning. |wolfgang = Be careful, little scout boy! |wendy = Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting. |wx78 = WEAPON AUGMENTATION. NICE BUT STILL PRIMITIVE |wickerbottom = What is that Walter up to now? |woodie = Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter. |maxwell = He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful. |wigfrid = The yöung scöut döth cöme intö his öwn. |webber = Walter has the best toys. |winona = Aww, Walt's quite the lil' tinkerer. |warly = Young Walter is an artist with his slingshot. |wortox = Hotshot! Is he not? |wormwood = Walter loves pew pew |wurt = Pine boy shooty toy. Florp! |walter = Kinda like hockey tape! |wanda = Rather innovative for a child. |choose = walter }} {{Scrapbook Info|It moderately increases your firing rate, which will ramp up if you shoot continuously.}} The '''Slingshot Grip Tape''' moderately increases the firing rate, which builds up the longer the player keeps shooting. If the player stops or moves, the speed resets and needs to ramp up again. At max ramp up, the fire rate increases to ~'''0.63s''', (which is a '''23.5%''' reduction in shot cooldown, or a '''33% ''' DPS increase of the basic slingshot). A smoke effect appears once the maximum speed is reached. If you start firing normally directly after shooting with either the scrappy or scrappier frame, the slingshot will start firing at its maximum ramp up. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center" !Number of
continuous shots !Firerate
(Frames) !Firerate
(Seconds) !Firerate
Reduction* !DPS
Increase* |- |0 (same as no grip) |24 |0.8 |N/A |N/A |- |1 ||23 |0.77 |3.75% |4% |- |2 ||22 |0.73 |8.75% |10% |- |3 ||21 |0.70 |12.5% |14% |- |4+ ||18 |0.6 |25% |33% |} *Firerate reduction and DPS increase are compared to the unmodded slingshot.{{clear}} ===Slingshot Sticky Grip=== {{Object Infobox |name = Slingshot Sticky Grip |description =Get attached to your slingshot. |ingredient1 = Glommer's Goop |multiplier1 = 1 |filter = {{Pic32|Walter Filter}} |image = Slingshot Sticky Grip Dropped.png |icon = Slingshot Sticky Grip.png |skill =Advanced Grips |skillOwner = Walter |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "slingshot_handle_sticky"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Walter's really giving it his best shot. |willow = That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning. |wolfgang = Be careful, little scout boy! |wendy = Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting. |wx78 = WEAPON AUGMENTATION. NICE BUT STILL PRIMITIVE |wickerbottom = What is that Walter up to now? |woodie = Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter. |maxwell = He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful. |wigfrid = The yöung scöut döth cöme intö his öwn. |webber = Walter has the best toys. |winona = Aww, Walt's quite the lil' tinkerer. |warly = Young Walter is an artist with his slingshot. |wortox = Hotshot! Is he not? |wormwood = Walter loves pew pew |wurt = Pine boy shooty toy. Florp! |walter = Gross but effective! |wanda = Rather innovative for a child. |choose = walter }} {{Scrapbook Info|It moderately increases your firing rate, and prevents your Slingshot from slipping out of your hands.}} The '''Slingshot Sticky Grip''' moderately increases the firing rate to '''0.63s''', or 19 frames (which is a '''20.8%''' reduction in shot cooldown, or a '''26%''' DPS increase of the basic slingshot) and prevents the Slingshot from slipping out of hands. {{clear}} ===Slingshot Jelly Grip=== {{Object Infobox |name = Slingshot Jelly Grip |description = The stickiest grip yet! |ingredient1 =Royal Jelly |multiplier1 = 1 |filter = {{Pic32|Walter Filter}} |image = Slingshot Jelly Grip Dropped.png |icon = Slingshot Jelly Grip.png |skill =Advanced Grips |skillOwner = Walter |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "slingshot_handle_jelly"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Walter's really giving it his best shot. |willow = That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning. |wolfgang = Be careful, little scout boy! |wendy = Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting. |wx78 = WEAPON AUGMENTATION. NICE BUT STILL PRIMITIVE |wickerbottom = What is that Walter up to now? |woodie = Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter. |maxwell = He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful. |wigfrid = The yöung scöut döth cöme intö his öwn. |webber = Walter has the best toys. |winona = Aww, Walt's quite the lil' tinkerer. |warly = Young Walter is an artist with his slingshot. |wortox = Hotshot! Is he not? |wormwood = Walter loves pew pew |wurt = Pine boy toys. Florp! |walter = Aww, super sticky! |wanda = Rather innovative for a child. |choose = walter }} {{Scrapbook Info|It greatly increases your firing rate and prevents your Slingshot from slipping out of your hands.}} The '''Slingshot Jelly Grip''' greatly increases the firing rate to '''0.5s''', or 15 frames (which is a '''37.5%''' reduction in shot cooldown, or a '''60%''' DPS increase of the basic slingshot) and prevents the Slingshot from slipping out of hands. {{clear}} ===Slingshot Void Wrap=== {{Rift Content|Shadow Rift}} {{Object Infobox |tier = 31 |name = Slingshot Void Wrap |description =Sling faster-er! |ingredient1 = Dark Tatters DST |multiplier1 = 1 |filter = {{Pic32|Walter Filter}} |image = Slingshot Void Wrap Dropped.png |icon = Slingshot Void Wrap.png |skill = Advanced Grips |skillOwner = Walter |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "slingshot_handle_voidcloth"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Walter's really giving it his best shot. |willow = That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning. |wolfgang = Be careful, little scout boy! |wendy = Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting. |wx78 = WEAPON AUGMENTATION. NICE BUT STILL PRIMITIVE |wickerbottom = What is that Walter up to now? |woodie = Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter. |maxwell = He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful. |wigfrid = The yöung scöut döth cöme intö his öwn. |webber = Walter has the best toys. |winona = Aww, Walt's quite the lil' tinkerer. |warly = Young Walter is an artist with his slingshot. |wortox = Hotshot! Is he not? |wormwood = Walter loves pew pew |wurt = Pine boy shooty toy. Florp! |walter = Thank you, shadow monster! |wanda = Rather innovative for a child. |choose = walter }} {{Scrapbook Info|It greatly increases your firing rate, which will ramp up if you shoot continuously.}} The '''Slingshot Void Wrap''' greatly increases the firing rate, which builds up the longer the player keeps shooting. If the player stops or moves, the speed resets and needs to ramp up again. At max ramp up, the fire rate increases to '''0.43''', (which is a '''45.8%''' reduction in shot cooldown, or a '''85%''' DPS increase of the basic slingshot). A smoke effect appears once the maximum speed is reached. When the player wears [[Void Cowl]] and uses the [[Dread Pebbles]], the pebbles will deal 10% more Physical Damage and 5 more Planar Damage. When the player wears Void Cowl and uses [[Pure Horror Rounds]], they will deal 10% more Physical Damage and 5 more Planar Damage. The tick damage from Pure Horror Rounds is unchanged but does 2 more ticks (9 ticks in total). Slingshot Void Wrap can be prototyped at [[Shadowcraft Plinth]]. If you start firing normally directly after shooting with either the scrappy or scrappier frame, the slingshot will start firing at its max Ramp up. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center" !Number of
continuous shots !Firerate
(Frames) !Firerate
(Seconds) !Firerate
Reduction* !DPS
Increase* |- |0 ||19 |0.63 |20.8% |26% |- |1 ||18 |0.60 |25.0% |33% |- |2 ||17 |0.57 |29.2% |41% |- |3 ||16 |0.53 |33.3% |50% |- |4+||13 |0.43 |45.8% |85% |} *Firerate reduction and DPS increase are compared to the unmodded slingshot. {{clear}} ==Frames== The '''Frames''' are used to extend the ammo slot and add a secondary attack. {{clear}} ===Bony Slingshot Frame=== {{Object Infobox |name = Bony Slingshot Frame |description = More ammo? Yes please! |ingredient1 = Bone Shards |multiplier1 = 2 |ingredient2 = Rope |multiplier2 = 1 |filter = {{Pic32|Walter Filter}} |image = Bony Slingshot Frame Dropped.png |icon = Bony Slingshot Frame.png |skill = Basic Customization |skillOwner = Walter |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "slingshot_frame_bone"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Walter's really giving it his best shot. |willow = That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning. |wolfgang = Be careful, little scout boy! |wendy = Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting. |wx78 = WEAPON AUGMENTATION. NICE BUT STILL PRIMITIVE |wickerbottom = What is that Walter up to now? |woodie = Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter. |maxwell = He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful. |wigfrid = The yöung scöut döth cöme intö his öwn. |webber = Walter has the best toys. |winona = Aww, Walt's quite the lil' tinkerer. |warly = Young Walter is an artist with his slingshot. |wortox = Hotshot! Is he not? |wormwood = Walter loves pew pew |wurt = Pine boy shooty toy. Florp! |walter = Bad to the bone! |wanda = Rather innovative for a child. |choose = walter }} {{Scrapbook Info|Adds a backup ammo slot to your Slingshot.}} The '''Bony Slingshot Frame''' adds an extra slot to the Slingshot, allowing players to store an additional stack of ammo. When the primary slot is empty, the ammo from the secondary slot automatically moves to replace it. {{clear}} ===Thulecite Slingshot Frame=== {{Object Infobox |name = Thulecite Slingshot Frame |description =A little bit of this, and a little bit of that! |ingredient1 = Thulecite |multiplier1 = 2 |ingredient2 = Nightmare Fuel |multiplier2 = 2 |ingredient3 = Red Gem |multiplier3 = 1 |ingredient4 = Blue Gem |multiplier4 = 1 |tier = 5 |filter = {{Pic32|Walter Filter}} |image = Thulecite Slingshot Frame Dropped.png |icon =Thulecite Slingshot Frame.png |skill =Advanced Frames |skillOwner = Walter |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "slingshot_frame_gems"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Walter's really giving it his best shot. |willow = That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning. |wolfgang = Be careful, little scout boy! |wendy = Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting. |wx78 = WEAPON AUGMENTATION. NICE BUT STILL PRIMITIVE |wickerbottom = What is that Walter up to now? |woodie = Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter. |maxwell = He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful. |wigfrid = The yöung scöut döth cöme intö his öwn. |webber = Walter has the best toys. |winona = Aww, Walt's quite the lil' tinkerer. |warly = Young Walter is an artist with his slingshot. |wortox = Hotshot! Is he not? |wormwood = Walter loves pew pew |wurt = Pine boy toys. Florp! |walter = Now we're getting fancy! |wanda = Rather innovative for a child. |choose = walter }} {{Scrapbook Info|Adds a special ammo slot to your Slingshot that is used for a secondary, alternate Slingshot attack, that extends any magic effects of your ammo to an area of effect.}} The '''Thulecite Slingshot Frame''' adds a secondary ammo slot for a special Slingshot attack. Players can right-click to choose the direction and fire from this slot to apply the ammo’s special effects in an area: * [[Freeze Rounds]] freeze all mobs in the area. * [[Slow-Down Rounds]] slow down all mobs in the area. * [[Cursed Rounds]] summon [[Shadow Tentacle/DST|Shadow Tentacles]] for each creature in the area. * [[Pure Horror Rounds]] apply 10 Planar Damage for 7 ticks to all creatures in the area. * [[Pure Brilliance Rounds]] apply a Pure Brilliance mark to all creatures in area, but the damage from the ammo only applies to hit target. The range of a special attack is significantly longer than a normal attack. {{clear}} ===Scrappy Slingshot Frame=== {{Object Infobox |name = Scrappy Slingshot Frame |description = Ya think you're some sorta big shot now, huh? |ingredient1 = Scrap |multiplier1 = 2 |ingredient2 = Electrical Doodad |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Frazzled Wires |multiplier3 = 1 |filter = {{Pic32|Walter Filter}} |image =Scrappy Slingshot Frame Dropped.png |icon =Scrappy Slingshot Frame.png |skill =Advanced Frames |skillOwner = Walter |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0"}} {{Quotes |wilson = Walter's really giving it his best shot. |willow = That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning. |wolfgang = Be careful, little scout boy! |wendy = Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting. |wx78 = WEAPON AUGMENTATION. Is he not? |wormwood = Walter loves pew pew |wurt = Pine boy toys. Florp! |walter = There's a real kick to it! |wanda = Rather innovative for a child. |choose = walter }} {{Scrapbook Info|Adds a secondary, alternate Slingshot attack, that can be charged by holding down to deal up to 200% damage.}} The '''Scrappy Slingshot Frame''' adds a special charge attack. Players can hold right-click to charge, dealing up to 200% damage to the hit creature. The AoE damage and damage from effects do not deal additional damage (Outside of Kablooies). This includes effects from: Cursed rounds, Pure horror rounds, and Brightshade husk rounds. The charging speed of the charge attack will be sped up by the Grip Tape or Void Wrap handles. The range of a charged attack is significantly longer than a normal attack. If you start firing normally directly after shooting with either the scrappy or scrappier frame, both the Slingshot grip tape and Slingshot void tape will start firing at their max firerate. {{clear}} ===Scrappier Slingshot Frame=== {{Object Infobox |name =Scrappier Slingshot Frame |description = Embrace your ammo hoarding tendencies! |ingredient1 = Scrappy Slingshot Frame |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Elastispacer |multiplier2 = 1 |filter = {{Pic32|Walter Filter}} |deconstruct = {{Pic32|Scrap}}×2, {{Pic32|Electrical Doodad}}×1, {{Pic32|Frazzled Wires}}×1, {{Pic32|Enlightened Shard}}×1, |image =Scrappier Slingshot Frame Dropped.png |icon =Scrappier Slingshot Frame.png |skill =Advanced Frames |skillOwner = Walter |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "slingshot_frame_wagpunk"}} {{Rift Content|Lunar Rift}} {{Quotes |wilson = Walter's really giving it his best shot. |willow = That kid loves slinging almost as much as I love burning. |wolfgang = Be careful, little scout boy! |wendy = Walter is getting serious with his slingshotting. |wx78 = WEAPON AUGMENTATION. BETTER |wickerbottom = What is that Walter up to now? |woodie = Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter. |maxwell = He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful. |wigfrid = The yöung scöut döth cöme intö his öwn. |webber = Walter has the best toys. |winona = Aww, Walt's quite the lil' tinkerer. |warly = Young Walter is an artist with his slingshot. |wortox = Hotshot! Is he not? |wormwood = Walter loves pew pew |wurt = Pine boy shooty toy. Florp! |walter = I could slingshot forever! |wanda = Rather innovative for a child. |choose = walter }} {{Scrapbook Info|Expands the ammo slot to unlimited stack size, and adds a secondary, alternate Slingshot attack, that can be charged by holding down to deal up to 200% damage.}} The '''Scrappier Slingshot Frame''' expands the ammo slot to unlimited stack size and adds a special charge attack. Players can hold right-click to charge, dealing up to 200% damage to target. The AoE damage and damage from effects do not deal additional damage. The charging speed of the charge attack will be sped up by the Grip Tape or Void Wrap handles. The range of a charged attack is significantly longer than a normal attack. {{clear}} =={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * In the game files, there is an unused [[Unimplemented_Items#Dragonfly_Grip|Dragonfly Grip]]. == [[File:Research Notes.png|32px]] Assets == Trusty Slingshot + Bony Slingshot Frame Dropped.png|Trusty Slingshot + Bony Slingshot Frame Dropped Trusty Slingshot + Thulecite Slingshot Frame Dropped.png|Trusty Slingshot + Thulecite Slingshot Frame Dropped Trusty Slingshot + Scrappy Slingshot Frame Dropped.png|Trusty Slingshot + Scrappy Slingshot Frame Dropped Trusty Slingshot + Pig Skin Slingshot Band Dropped.png|Trusty Slingshot + Pig Skin Slingshot Band Dropped Trusty Slingshot + Flailing Slingshot Band Dropped.png|Trusty Slingshot + Flailing Slingshot Band Dropped Trusty Slingshot + Possessed Slingshot Band Dropped.png|Trusty Slingshot + Possessed Slingshot Band Dropped Trusty Slingshot + Slingshot Void Grip Dropped.png|Trusty Slingshot + Slingshot Void Grip Dropped Trusty Slingshot + Slingshot Grip Tape Dropped.png|Trusty Slingshot + Slingshot Grip Tape Dropped Trusty Slingshot + Slingshot Sticky Handle Dropped.png|Trusty Slingshot + Slingshot Sticky Handle Dropped Scrappy Slingshot Frame Dropped Old.png|Scrappy Slingshot Frame Dropped Old Scrappy Slingshot Frame Old.png|Scrappy Slingshot Frame Old {{Craftable Items and Structures on DST}} [[vi:Slingshot_Part]]
